items.title: Audit placeholders and fallbacks
items.notes: Identified fallback/weather/injury/odds placeholders in generate_fast_reports.py, data_quality_enhancer.py, enhanced_predictor.py, flashscore_scraper.py, legacy market connectors, and others.

items.title: Propose prioritized fixes
items.notes: High/medium/low priority fixes proposed; Open-Meteo, injuries API, market odds, observability and config centralization recommended.

items.title: Offer implementation options
items.notes: Offered quick wins: A (data provenance flags), B (move constants to config), C (Open-Meteo integration), D (tests for fallbacks).

items.title: Implement A: Add data-provenance flags
items.notes: Added boolean flags and detailed provenance to match_data JSON. Implemented caps/provenance wiring in data_quality_enhancer.py, merged provenance into prediction.json, and added unit + integration tests verifying provenance presence.

items.title: Build outcomes store and continuous backtest
items.notes: Log every prediction + actual result in data/predictions, track model version, and compute rolling Brier/log-loss metrics.

items.title: Integrate market odds signals
items.notes: Added OddsDataConnector with The Odds API support, blended market probabilities into EnhancedPredictor final outputs, and introduced regression tests covering odds parsing and blending.

items.title: Lineup and player-aware modeling
items.notes: Track starting XI, injury severity, replacement quality and inject into strength metrics and ML features.

items.title: Calibrate probabilistic outputs
items.notes: Apply Platt or isotonic calibration on held-out data and report Brier reliability plots in reports.

items.title: Bayesian scoring model for goals
items.notes: Introduce hierarchical Poisson/Negative Binomial model via PyMC with team-level random effects and posterior predictive intervals.

items.title: Dynamic ensemble weighting
items.notes: Replace fixed ensemble weights with performance-aware weights learned from recent backtests.

items.title: Feature expansion with real-world signals
items.notes: Add event-level xG, possession-adjusted ratings, set-piece metrics, referee tendencies and weather adjustments from real feeds.

items.title: Model monitoring and drift detection
items.notes: Automate Brier/log-loss monitoring, drift alerts, and retrain triggers with dashboards or scheduled reports.

items.title: Market-informed calibration
items.notes: Blend model probabilities with market implied odds using data-driven mixing coefficients to reduce bias.

next_steps: Advance item #7 by wiring lineup/injury intelligence into model features
Design calibration workflow (item #8/#13) once lineup-aware pipeline is in place
